---
title: Quantifying barotropic and baroclinic eddy feedbacks in the persistence of
  the Southern Annular Mode
pagetitle: 2014-12-1-Nie2014 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2014
author: Yu Nie, Yang Zhang, Gang Chen, Xiu-qun Yang and D Alex Burrows
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 41, 8636--8644, doi:10.1002/2014GL062210.
recommended_citation: 'Yu Nie, Yang Zhang, Gang Chen, Xiu-qun Yang and D Alex Burrows,
  2014: Quantifying barotropic and baroclinic eddy feedbacks in the persistence of
  the Southern Annular Mode, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 41, 8636--8644,
  doi:10.1002/2014GL062210.'
paper_url: http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/2014GL062210
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Quantifying barotropic and baroclinic eddy feedbacks in the persistence of the Southern Annular Mode

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2014*

**Recommended citation:** Yu Nie, Yang Zhang, Gang Chen, Xiu-qun Yang and D Alex Burrows, 2014: Quantifying barotropic and baroclinic eddy feedbacks in the persistence of the Southern Annular Mode, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 41, 8636--8644, doi:10.1002/2014GL062210.

[Download paper](http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/2014GL062210){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
